headline: Is Southwest Airlines (LUV) Now Attractively Priced After Recent Share Price Rebound?
summary: If you are wondering whether Southwest Airlines at around US$41.39 is offering fair value or a potential mispricing, this article walks through what the current data is saying about the stock. The stock has seen returns of 9.2% over the last week, 9.3% over the last month, 0.2% year to date, 35.9% over the last year and 52.6% over three years, while the five year return stands at a 25.4% decline. Recent headlines around Southwest Airlines have focused on broader sector sentiment and...

headline: With Spirit gone, what could this mean for passenger throughput numbers?
summary: Investing.com -- Transportation Security Administration (TSA) screening data for U.S. airlines showed a marginal improvement last week, although year-over-year growth remains in negative territory.
